Name: BossParam
Description: Defines parameters related to parts on bosses.

Fields.Name: Parts Type
Fields.Description: The target parts type.

Fields.Name: Is Ragdoll Part Enabled
Fields.Description: If enabled, ragdoll part is enabled.

Fields.Name: Part 1: HP
Fields.Description: The HP value of the part in slot 1.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Broken Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation to play when the part in slot 1 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Broken Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon to to play the animation from when the part in slot 1 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Broken Object ID
Fields.Description: The object ID given when the part in slot 1 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Broken Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID set when the part in slot 1 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 2: HP
Fields.Description: The HP value of the part in slot 2.

Fields.Name: Part 2: Broken Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation to play when the part in slot 2 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 2: Broken Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon to to play the animation from when the part in slot 2 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 2: Broken Object ID
Fields.Description: The object ID given when the part in slot 2 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 2: Broken Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID set when the part in slot 2 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 3: HP
Fields.Description: The HP value of the part in slot 3.

Fields.Name: Part 3: Broken Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation to play when the part in slot 3 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 3: Broken Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon to to play the animation from when the part in slot 3 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 3: Broken Object ID
Fields.Description: The object ID given when the part in slot 3 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 3: Broken Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID set when the part in slot 3 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 4: HP
Fields.Description: The HP value of the part in slot 4.

Fields.Name: Part 4: Broken Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation to play when the part in slot 4 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 4: Broken Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon to to play the animation from when the part in slot 4 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 4: Broken Object ID
Fields.Description: The object ID given when the part in slot 4 is broken.

Fields.Name: Part 4: Broken Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID set when the part in slot 4 is broken.
